name: opencode-usage-monitor
description: OpenCode TUI sidebar plugin that displays API usage quotas for OpenAI and Z.AI (GLM) providers

scripts.build: bun build src/tui.ts --outfile dist/tui.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opentui/solid --external solid-js
scripts.build:index: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/sdk
scripts.build:all: bun run build:index && bun run build && bun run build:types
scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'Skipping build -- CI already built dist/'

author: mark <i@mark1708.ru>
